vo: 在油價高漲的時代，每次踩下油門，您是否也在心疼燃油車那無底洞般的油錢與稅金？

The driver is standing next to a traditional sedan under bright afternoon sunlight, looking concerned. Beautiful lens flare, warm golden hour atmosphere, highly detailed, realistic skin texture. Bright cinematic sunlight, optimistic warm color tone, vibrant natural colors, beautiful lens flare, hyper-realistic, professional color grading, shot on 35mm anamorphic lens, hopeful and uplifting atmosphere.

t2v_prompt_en: A slow cinematic panning shot of a spacious, ultra-modern Toyota Certified Pre-Owned showroom in Taiwan. vo: 結合和泰產險專屬新能源車險，與長期的稅金全免優勢，幫您把每一步成本降到最低。

vo: 滿意您的模擬方案嗎？一鍵生成您的 EV Pilot Pass，開啟您的專屬純電體驗。
audio_cue: 環境音：電子票券生成的清脆鈴聲（Chime），伴隨微弱的全像投影沙沙聲。背景音樂：帶有期待感與未來感的上升音階旋律，情緒逐漸高漲。
t2v_prompt_en: A close-up shot showing a smartphone screen held in hand in a bright, sunlit modern city park. On the screen, a luxury virtual ticket named 'EV Pilot Pass' glows beautifully with bright green and sky blue neon borders, displaying a QR code. Holographic reflections shimmer under the natural sunlight as the phone tilts slightly. Bright cinematic sunlight, optimistic warm color tone, vibrant natural colors, beautiful lens flare, hyper-realistic, professional color grading, shot on 35mm anamorphic lens, hopeful and uplifting atmosphere.

vo: 抵達實體展間時，業務掃描條碼，您的用車習慣與關切焦點已瞬間同步至業務平板。
